# FrameTimeline { #natural_features.FrameTimeline }

```python
FrameTimeline(
    frame_index,
    onset_s,
    offset_s,
    source=None,
    fps=None,
    reference=STIMULUS_CLOCK,
    temporal_context=TemporalContext(),
)
```

A non-lossy map between continuous seconds and discrete video frames.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [annotate_events](#natural_features.FrameTimeline.annotate_events) | Return a copy of ``events`` with frame index/time columns in ``extra``. |
| [from_fps](#natural_features.FrameTimeline.from_fps) | Build a regular timeline covering a clip duration at a known FPS. |
| [from_video_stimulus](#natural_features.FrameTimeline.from_video_stimulus) | Build a timeline from a materialized ``VideoStimulus``. |
| [map_events](#natural_features.FrameTimeline.map_events) | Map event intervals to frame indices using an explicit policy. |
| [to_rows](#natural_features.FrameTimeline.to_rows) | Return a dependency-light table representation. |

### annotate_events { #natural_features.FrameTimeline.annotate_events }

```python
FrameTimeline.annotate_events(events, *, policy='overlap')
```

Return a copy of ``events`` with frame index/time columns in ``extra``.

### from_fps { #natural_features.FrameTimeline.from_fps }

```python
FrameTimeline.from_fps(
    duration_s,
    fps,
    start_s=0.0,
    first_frame_index=0,
    source=None,
    reference=STIMULUS_CLOCK,
    temporal_context=TemporalContext(),
)
```

Build a regular timeline covering a clip duration at a known FPS.

### from_video_stimulus { #natural_features.FrameTimeline.from_video_stimulus }

```python
FrameTimeline.from_video_stimulus(video, *, source=None)
```

Build a timeline from a materialized ``VideoStimulus``.

### map_events { #natural_features.FrameTimeline.map_events }

```python
FrameTimeline.map_events(events, *, policy='overlap')
```

Map event intervals to frame indices using an explicit policy.

### to_rows { #natural_features.FrameTimeline.to_rows }

```python
FrameTimeline.to_rows()
```

Return a dependency-light table representation.
